hero.description: I work at the intersection of design, artificial intelligence, and emerging technologies, exploring new forms of creation, prototyping, and applied innovation in education, culture, and organizations.

about.p1: Designer and researcher with a Master's degree in Design & Technology and a Bachelor's in Social Communication from UFRGS. I work at CriaLab - Tecnopuc leading innovation and technology projects, including immersive technologies (VR/AR), developing strategic solutions for companies like HP and public institutions (e.g., Semear Agrohub).
about.p2: I have hands-on experience in rapid prototyping, 3D printing, and workshop facilitation. As a technology enthusiast, I leverage AI for strategic analysis, insight generation, and service design.
about.p3: My background includes working as a professor at ESPM, leading marketing at Anglo Vestibulares, and working at startup BSMotion—always at the intersection of tech, design, and innovation.

projects.header_subtitle: A curated selection of projects demonstrating my expertise in design, technology, and innovation.

items.title: MuseuVR
items.desc: PhD project focused on natural interactions in virtual cultural environments to develop immersive museum experiences.

items.title: Semear AgroHUB
items.desc: UX Strategy and governance model for an agribusiness innovation hub connecting farmers to sustainable technologies. [Project reports](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1gzqqo3-NV_Og9F25TjcPWdHq9tUjAXEm/view?usp=sharing)

items.title: Projeto Aula 360º
items.desc: Educational initiative employing immersive technologies (Virtual Reality) to create advanced learning experiences.

items.title: Mobiteste App UX Evaluation
items.desc: Extensive Usability Research of the 'Mobiteste' educational tool with a primary focus on student UX mapping.

items.title: Mandatory Reading E-Book UFRGS
items.desc: Development of smart digital educational materials assisting high school students with exam prep material.

items.title: 3D Digitalization: Heritage Preservation
items.desc: Development of an open 3D repository showcasing scans of historic architecture dedicated to cultural dissemination.

items.title: MataArte
items.desc: Unique 360° exhibition fusing generative AI upscaling pipelines combined with raw analog photography experiments.

items.title: IASPI AR - 3D Postcard
items.desc: Creation of an augmented reality smart postcard representing Porto Alegre architecture for an international summit. [Project details](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1ls8JBOotSEa8f7nBAFqPVHz0d7_P59E5/view?usp=sharing)

items.title: Gesture Keys
items.desc: App that uses artificial intelligence to recognize hand gestures via webcam and convert them into keyboard shortcuts. The camera detects gestures in real time (closed fist, open hand, thumbs up, thumbs down, peace, "I love you", pointing) and each gesture can be mapped to Windows shortcuts (Alt+F4, Ctrl+C, Ctrl+V, etc.). Control your PC with gestures — switch slides, adjust volume, close programs, take screenshots and more.

videos.title: MUSEU VR - MEDIA COVERAGE
videos.desc: National TV feature on the Virtual Museum prototype developed at UFRGS

videos.title: TECNOPUC 3D HUB
videos.desc: Showcase of applied 3D research and technologies maintained at TECNOPUC

videos.title: MUSEUVR DEMO
videos.desc: Interactive showcase of the robust gesture engine powering MuseuVR

videos.title: 3D SCANNING - CHEMISTRY HUB UFRGS
videos.desc: Fascinating LiDAR-based reality capture mapping the Historic UFRGS Campus

videos.title: IASPI 3D SUMMIT DEMO
videos.desc: Live recording mapping AR objects to a physical souvenir postcard prototype

videos.title: GRAFFITI VR EXPERIENCE
videos.desc: Interactive VR spray-painting physics engine experiment

videos.title: GESTURE KEYS
videos.desc: Control your PC with hand gestures using artificial intelligence
